  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.ack

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.ack
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ClientAckRequestProcessor
    客户端ACK请求处理器 负责处理客户端收到的ACK请求，专注于协议层面处理

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.bye

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.bye
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ByeRequestProcessorClient
    客户端BYE请求处理器 负责处理客户端收到的BYE请求，专注于协议层面处理

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.cancel

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.cancel
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CancelRequestProcessor
    客户端CANCEL请求处理器 负责处理客户端收到的CANCEL请求，专注于协议层面处理

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.info

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.info
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InfoRequestProcessor
    客户端INFO请求处理器 负责处理客户端收到的INFO请求，专注于协议层面处理 按照SIP处理器业务逻辑分离规范，只负责SIP协议层面的处理，不包含业务逻辑

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.invite

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.invite
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InviteRequestProcessor
    SIP命令类型： 收到Invite请求 客户端发起Invite请求, Invite Request消息实现，请求视频指令

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.transmit.request.message

    Description

    ClientMessageRequestProcessor
    客户端MESSAGE请求处理器 负责处理客户端收到的MESSAGE请求，专注于协议层面处理

    客户端SUBSCRIBE请求处理器 负责处理客户端收到的SUBSCRIBE请求，专注于协议层面处理

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.request

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.request
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ServerAbstractSipRequestProcessor
    Server模块SIP请求处理器抽象基类 为server模块提供统一的请求处理器基类，便于模块隔离和功能扩展

  • Uses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.request.bye

    Subclasses of SipRequestProcessorAbstract in io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.request.bye
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ByeRequestProcessorServer
    Server模块BYE请求处理器 只负责SIP协议层面的处理，业务逻辑通过ServerByeProcessorHandler接口实现
